title: VEMA-084 My Friend's Wife Is A Horny Home Tutor Maki Hojo - Hojo Asahi
overview: Ryosuke is a ronin after failing his university entrance exams. Worried about Ryosuke, his father decides to have Maki, the wife of an acquaintance and an excellent tutor, watch Ryosuke study. Ryosuke wants to pass the exam next year, but he is worried about Maki's sexy chest. Maki, who noticed it, gave Ryosuke a naughty reward every time he solved the problem, leading Ryosuke to pass the university.
